gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/252)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/252)
text: نَظَرَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِلَى رَجُلٍ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْمَدِينَةِ قَدِ اشْتَرَى لِعِيَالِهِ شَيْئاً وَ هُوَ يَحْمِلُهُ فَلَمَّا رَآهُ الرَّجُلُ اسْتَحْيَا مِنْهُ فَقَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) اشْتَرَيْتَهُ لِعِيَالِكَ وَ حَمَلْتَهُ إِلَيْهِمْ أَمَا وَ اللَّهِ لَوْ لَا أَهْلُ الْمَدِينَةِ لَأَحْبَبْتُ أَنْ أَشْتَرِيَ لِعِيَالِيَ الشَّيْ‏ءَ ثُمَّ أَحْمِلَهُ إِلَيْهِمْ .

en.hubeali: From him, Ibn Fazzal, and Muhassin Bin Ahmad, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> looked at a man from the people of Al-Medina who had bought something for his dependants, and he was carrying it. So when the man saw him<sup>asws</sup>, he was embarrassed from him<sup>asws</sup>. So Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said ‘ I can see that you carry what you have purchased for your family. But, by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, had it not been for the people of Al-Medina, I<sup>asws</sup> would have loved to buy something for my<sup>asws</sup> dependants, then carry it to them (myself<sup>asws</sup>)’.
en.sarwar: 10. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from his father from ‘Abd Allah ibn al-Qasim from ‘Amr ibn abu al-Miqdam from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Of the things that Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, revealed to David was this: ‘O Dawud (David), just as the closest people to Allah are the humble people, arrogant people are the farthest from Allah.’”
